subject: Audit 11 templates against design token spec and fix drift
description: Run token audit: check each template uses #0a0a0a bg, #111 card, ui-monospace, 1px #2a2a2a borders

pass_if: all 11 templates pass token diff against connector_audit_94.html palette
no inline colors outside the 8 system tokens
fail_if: any template uses wrong background color
